mapper.sql: COUNT(*) AS totalCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedCount, ROUND(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS failureRate, ROUND(AVG(t.latency_ms), 2) AS avgLatencyMs, SUM(t.audio_bytes) AS totalAudioBytes, SUM(t.text_chars) AS totalTextChars, SUM(CASE WHEN t.cache_hit = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cacheHitCount, ROUND(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN t.cache_hit = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS cacheHitRate, SUM(CASE WHEN t.duplicate_request = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS duplicateRequestCount, ROUND(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN t.duplicate_request = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS duplicateRequestRate
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id AS id, DATE_FORMAT(t.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(t.event_day, '%Y-%m-%d') AS eventDay, t.user_id AS userId, t.scope AS scope, t.provider_source AS providerSource, t.model_name AS modelName, t.voice_name AS voiceName, t.template_code AS templateCode, t.status AS status, t.text_chars AS textChars, t.audio_bytes AS audioBytes, t.latency_ms AS latencyMs, CASE WHEN t.cache_hit = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS cacheHit, CASE WHEN t.duplicate_request = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS duplicateRequest, t.error_code AS errorCode, t.request_fingerprint AS requestFingerprint FROM app_voice_stat_event t
ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.scope AS scope,
FROM app_voice_stat_event t WHERE t.created_at >= #{cutoffAt} GROUP BY t.scope ORDER BY t.scope ASC

SELECT t.provider_source AS providerSource, COUNT(*) AS totalCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedCount, ROUND(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS failureRate, ROUND(AVG(t.latency_ms), 2) AS avgLatencyMs FROM app_voice_stat_event t WHERE t.created_at >= #{cutoffAt} AND t.provider_source != '' GROUP BY t.provider_source ORDER BY totalCalls DESC, t.provider_source ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.error_code AS errorCode, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, MAX(t.scope) AS sampleScope, MAX(t.provider_source) AS sampleProviderSource, MAX(t.model_name) AS sampleModelName FROM app_voice_stat_event t WHERE t.created_at >= #{cutoffAt} AND t.status = 'FAILED' AND t.error_code != '' GROUP BY t.error_code ORDER BY totalCount DESC, t.error_code ASC LIMIT #{limit}
